mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_book_value_inventory ( store, sku, supplier_code, supplier_contract, purchase_qty, closing_qty, unbill_qty, period_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{store}, #{sku}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierContract}, #{receivingQty}, #{receivingQty}, 0, CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (store, sku, supplier_code, supplier_contract) DO UPDATE SET purchase_qty = supplier_book_value_inventory.purchase_qty + EXCLUDED.purchase_qty, closing_qty = supplier_book_value_inventory.closing_qty + EXCLUDED.closing_qty, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, period_date = CURRENT_DATE
